MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Howard Melamed, Esq. (925) 932-0417 for Defendant and Moving Party Lerner
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT ESTHER LERNER'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES: GRANTED against Raul V. Aguilar in the amount of $73,940.00 attorney fees, costs of $649.60, interest through 07/28/04 of $22,326.74. This award is added to the 06/05/2000 judgment in the amount of $70,986.29; the total judgment is $167,902.63. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
